headline: Diabetic Eye Checkup in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: If you have diabetes, an annual dilated eye exam is essential -- even without symptoms. Medical Retina Fellowship-trained Dr. Rajeswari protects your vision proactively.
metaDescription: Diabetic eye checkup and diabetic retinopathy screening in KK Nagar, Chennai with Medical Retina Fellowship-trained Dr. Rajeswari. Call or book online.
symptoms: You have Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, any duration
It's been over a year since your last dilated eye exam
You've noticed any blurring, floaters, or vision changes
Your blood sugar has been difficult to control
You have diabetes and are pregnant

processSteps.title: Dilated Examination
processSteps.description: A thorough look at the retina to catch silent, early-stage changes.

processSteps.title: Retinal Imaging
processSteps.description: Precise documentation to track any changes over time.

processSteps.title: Proactive Management
processSteps.description: Catching diabetic retinopathy early, when it's most treatable.
